---
title: "Stroke Risk Sankey Diagram"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Stroke Risk Sankey Diagram}
  %\VignetteEngine{rmarkdown::html_vignette}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(strokeSankey)

data(stroke_par_blacks)

plot_sankey_stroke(stroke_par_blacks)

plot_sankey_stroke(stroke_par_blacks, vertical_gap = 0.02, horizontal_gap = 0.05)

plot_sankey_stroke(stroke_par_blacks, vertical_gap = 0.02, horizontal_gap = 0)

plot_sankey_stroke(stroke_par_blacks, vertical_gap = 0, horizontal_gap = 0.05)

plot_sankey_stroke(stroke_par_blacks, vertical_gap = 0, horizontal_gap = 0)
